description: Evidence.kind — deterministic classification of an attachment (graph-intake parity). `.jpg/.jpeg/.png` -> image; `.pdf/.docx/.doc` -> instruction; the message MIME (.eml) -> email; valuation Companion Report -> valuation; the generated EVA drag-drop JSON -> eva_payload; everything else -> other. Prototype union (mock/types.ts EvidenceKind) lacks `other`; it is added per data-model.md §Evidence + Phase-1 §4.
